origin.name: Indonesia
origin.death_registration: Local civil registry (Dinas Kependudukan dan Catatan Sipil)
origin.death_certificate_language: Bahasa Indonesia. Certified English translation required.
origin.bali_transfer_note: Deaths in Bali require internal transfer to Jakarta (Soekarno-Hatta, CGK) for international cargo. Add 1-2 days. Most British deaths in Indonesia occur in Bali.
origin.cremation_note: Cremation available in Bali (Hindu tradition) and Jakarta. Particularly straightforward for Bali deaths.
origin.key_document: Surat keterangan kematian (with certified English translation)
origin.source: FCDO Indonesia travel advice, updated 2025; British Embassy Jakarta guidance

destinations.name: United Kingdom
key_documents: Surat keterangan kematian with certified English translation
special_rules: Bali deaths require internal transfer to Jakarta (CGK) before international cargo. Add 1-2 days.
Death certificate in Bahasa Indonesia. Certified English translation mandatory.
Police must be notified for all unexpected deaths. Province-specific procedures vary.
destinations.dest_reception: The UK funeral director takes custody at the cargo terminal. All Indonesian documentation must be in certified English. The coroner for the district is notified.
destinations.dest_consular_note: FCDO 24-hour emergency line: +44 (0)20 7008 5000. The British Embassy in Jakarta can register the death and advise.
destinations.seo_title: Indonesia to UK Repatriation: Guidance for British Families
destinations.seo_description: Someone has died in Indonesia. Bali and Jakarta cases handled. Repatriation to the UK takes 14-28 days. Contact us 24/7.

destinations.name: Ireland
key_documents: Surat keterangan kematian with certified English translation
special_rules: Bali transfer to Jakarta required before international departure.
Irish consular matters for Indonesia handled via the Irish Embassy in Singapore.
destinations.dest_reception: The Irish funeral director takes custody at the cargo terminal. All Indonesian documentation must be in certified English. The Coroner is notified.
destinations.dest_consular_note: Department of Foreign Affairs emergency line: +353 1 408 2000. Irish consular matters for Indonesia handled via the Irish Embassy in Singapore.
destinations.seo_title: Indonesia to Ireland: Funeral Repatriation Guidance
destinations.seo_description: Someone has died in Indonesia and needs to come home to Ireland. Bali and Jakarta cases handled. 14-28 days. Contact us 24/7.
